justification: All 5 ACs implemented with correct HTTP codes and error codes. AC5 idempotency is explicitly distinct from AC2 conflict check — short-circuits before findByEmail. AC3 uses a simple regex, no external library. Tests cover all 5 ACs with explicit names. acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 5 ACs to test names. files_changed lists both handler and test file.

observations.text: AC5 idempotency handled correctly — short-circuits before findByEmail and updateEmail, verified via call counts
Guard ordering is explicit and tested: format → existence → idempotency → conflict → write
AC3 uses simple regex /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/ — no external validation library
7 parameterised cases for AC3 including null/undefined/empty edge cases
45 tests all passing with dedicated describe blocks per AC
Handler factory pattern with injected repository makes testing clean without mocking express
